title: An Act to Require the State to Pay Medicare Part B Premiums for Certain Retired State Employees
last_house_action: 5/27/2025 - PASSED TO BE ENACTED . Sent for concurrence. ORDERED SENT FORTHWITH.
last_senate_action: 4/29/2026 - Died in Possession of the Senate when the Legislature adjourned Sine Die and was PLACED IN THE LEGISLATIVE FILES . (DEAD)

actions.description: Received by the Secretary of the Senate on February 5, 2025 and REFERRED to the Committee on LABOR pursuant to Joint Rule 308.2
CARRIED OVER , in the same posture, to the next special or regular session of the 132nd Legislature, pursuant to Joint Order SP 519.

Reports Read On motion by Senator TIPPING of Penobscot the Majority Ought to Pass as Amended Report ACCEPTED . Bill READ ONCE Committee Amendment "A" (S-113) READ and ADOPTED. Under suspension of the Rules, READ A SECOND TIME and PASSED TO BE ENGROSSED AS AMENDED by Committee Amendment "A" (S-113) Sent down forthwith for concurrence.

Reports READ . On motion of Representative ROEDER of Bangor, the Majority Ought to Pass as Amended Report was ACCEPTED . The Bill was READ ONCE . Committee Amendment "A" (S-113) was READ and ADOPTED . Under suspension of the rules, the Bill was given its SECOND READING without REFERENCE to the Committee on Bills in the Second Reading . The Bill was PASSED TO BE ENGROSSED as Amended by Committee Amendment "A" (S-113) . In concurrence. ORDERED SENT FORTHWITH.
PASSED TO BE ENACTED . Sent for concurrence. ORDERED SENT FORTHWITH.
On motion by Senator ROTUNDO of Androscoggin PLACED ON THE SPECIAL APPROPRIATIONS TABLE pending ENACTMENT in concurrence.
CARRIED OVER , in the same posture, to any special or regular session of the 132nd Legislature, pursuant to Joint Order SP 800.
Died in Possession of the Senate when the Legislature adjourned Sine Die and was PLACED IN THE LEGISLATIVE FILES . (DEAD)
